summary: Initial decompilation/matching for the gmTitle unit. The PR populated src/melee/gm/gmtitle.c and gmtitle.h with title-screen camera, light, and fog GObj setup routines, renamed four previously generic symbols to gmTitle_* in GALE01 symbols, and made baselib controller pad_bit const. The decomp.dev report showed 9 new gmTitle matches for +772 bytes and +0.02% matched code.
what_changed: Added gmTitle.c implementations for nine matched title-screen functions: gmTitle_801A146C, gmTitle_801A1630, gmTitle_801A1814, gmTitle_801A185C, gmTitle_801A18D4, gmTitle_801A1944, gmTitle_801A19AC, gmTitle_801A1A18, and gmTitle_801A1A3C.
Defined two Vec3 data objects, gmTitle_803DA4F0 and gmTitle_803DA4FC, used as positions/targets passed to mn_8022ED6C.
Added static descriptor pointers for camera, lights, and fog: gmTitle_804D6708, gmTitle_804D670C, and gmTitle_804D6710.
Implemented camera GObj creation paths using GObj_Create, lb_80013B14, HSD_GObjObject_80390A70, GObj_SetupGXLinkMax, HSD_CObjSetCurrent, HSD_GObj_80390ED0, HSD_SetEraseColor, and HSD_CObjEraseScreen.
Implemented light and fog GObj setup using lb_80011AC4, HSD_GObj_LObjCallback, HSD_FogLoadDesc, HSD_GObj_FogCallback, HSD_FogInterpretAnim, and HSD_GObjProc_8038FD54.
Added gmtitle.h include guard and prototypes for externally visible gmTitle_801A185C, gmTitle_801A1944, gmTitle_801A19AC, and gmTitle_801A1A3C.
Renamed symbols in config/GALE01/symbols.txt from fn_801A1630, fn_801A1814, fn_801A18D4, and fn_801A1A18 to gmTitle_801A1630, gmTitle_801A1814, gmTitle_801A18D4, and gmTitle_801A1A18.
Changed src/sysdolphin/baselib/controller.c pad_bit from mutable u32[4] to const u32[4], likely to match data placement/constness for this build.
smart_moves: Kept callbacks and helper routines static where the new header did not need to expose them, while only declaring the factory/setup functions needed externally.
Used existing baselib accessor macros GET_JOBJ, GET_COBJ, and GET_FOG rather than open-coding object casts, improving matchability and consistency with other HSD code.
Matched the title-screen rendering structure by separating camera draw callback, erase-screen callback, light setup, fog animation callback, and fog GObj creation into small address-named functions.
Preserved exact GObj priorities, GX link choices, object-kind constants, and gxlink_prios assignment, which are typically sensitive for decomp matching.
Included PAD_STACK(8) in gmTitle_801A19AC, indicating attention to stack layout/alignment required for matching.
Updated symbols.txt to replace generic fn_* names with gmTitle_* names for newly identified static functions, making future references more searchable.
decomp_lessons: For newly opened game-mode units, it is useful to land a narrow first pass that matches small rendering setup/callback functions before attempting larger state-machine routines.
Title-screen setup code reuses common HSD patterns: create a GObj, load camera/light/fog descriptors, attach with HSD_GObjObject_80390A70, then register GX/proc callbacks.
Const-correctness in unrelated-looking baselib data can be part of matching; moving pad_bit to const changed only two lines but may affect section placement or generated code.
Headers should expose only functions that are externally referenced; callbacks such as gmTitle_801A1814, gmTitle_801A18D4, and gmTitle_801A1A18 remained file-local.
Use address-based names with the owning module prefix, such as gmTitle_801A1A3C, until semantic names are justified by stronger evidence.
naming_conventions: Module prefix used is gmTitle_ with the original function address suffix, e.g. gmTitle_801A185C.
Previously unidentified local functions in symbols.txt were renamed from fn_801Axxxx to gmTitle_801Axxxx once assigned to the gmTitle unit.
Global data follows the same module-address convention, e.g. gmTitle_803DA4F0, gmTitle_803DA4FC, gmTitle_804D6708, gmTitle_804D670C, and gmTitle_804D6710.
Header guard used the legacy uppercase underscore style _GMTITLE_H_.
The PR did not introduce semantic names for the title-screen routines; evidence supports only address-based gmTitle names.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used PAD_STACK(8) in gmTitle_801A19AC to preserve stack shape for matching.
Declared pad_bit as const u32[4], a small data-qualifier adjustment that can affect section placement and matching.
Copied fog color into a local GXColor erase_color before passing channels to HSD_SetEraseColor, matching the observed code shape.
Kept an HSD_CObj* local in camera setup functions and used the existing lb_80013B14 camera loader path, matching common compiler output patterns in nearby HSD setup code.
Used exact numeric constants for GObj creation and GX setup: 0x13/0x14 cameras, 0xB/0x3/0x80 lights, 0xA/0x3 fog, GX link priorities 0xC and 0, and gxlink_prios 0x209.
review_feedback: No human review comments were present in the provided PR slice.
decomp.dev reported the PR increased GALE01 matched code to 28.32%, +0.02% and +772 bytes.

decomp.dev reported 9 new 100% matches in main/melee/gm/gmtitle: gmTitle_801A1A3C, gmTitle_801A185C, gmTitle_801A18D4, gmTitle_801A19AC, gmTitle_801A1944, gmTitle_801A1814, gmTitle_801A146C, gmTitle_801A1630, and gmTitle_801A1A18.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that continue matching gmTitle_801A1134, gmTitle_801A12C4, gmTitle_801A1498, gmTitle_801A165C, gmTitle_801A1AC0, or gmTitle_801A1C18.
Search for subsequent semantic renames of gmTitle_801A185C, gmTitle_801A1944, gmTitle_801A19AC, and gmTitle_801A1A3C.
Look for other PRs that changed data to const for section placement or matching, especially in sysdolphin/baselib.
Compare gmTitle camera/light/fog setup with menu or intro modules using the same HSD GObj patterns.
